rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH GOMEZ VS. ERLINDA SELMA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 16, 2016, 2016, Line 4. PLAINTIFF MARIA LABITORIA'S Motion To Tax Costs. Patrick Hill (and any other individual from Legal Assistance to the Elderly with personal knowledge) is ordered to provide a detailed declaration regarding the circumstances of obtaining Ex. C from Plaintiff and the basis for the statement under the penalty of perjury that exhibit C was "furnished¿ by Plaintiff ." Declaration(s) must be filed and served no later than 9:00 a.m. on September 16, 2016 and courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501. Motion to tax costs is granted in part: the amount of $800.53 is taxed; Defendant to recover $2,871.47 incurred by the non-profit organization in defending the defendant/prevailing party. (See Ex. A and B to Hill Declaration). =(501/REQ)
